page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Peptideshaker is a search engine independent platform for interpretation of proteomics identification results from multiple search engines, currently supporting x!tandem, ms-gf+, ms amanda, omssa, myrimatch, comet, tide, mascot, andromeda and mzidentml. by combining the results from multiple search engines, while re-calculating ptm localization scores and redoing the protein inference, peptideshaker attempts to give you the best possible understanding of your proteomics data!
page_metadata.biotools__summary: PeptideShaker is a search engine independent platform for interpretation of proteomics identification results from multiple search engines, currently supporting X!Tandem, MS-GF+, MS Amanda, OMSSA, MyriMatch, Comet, Tide, Mascot, Andromeda and mzIdentML. By combining the results from multiple search engines, while re-calculating PTM localization scores and redoing the protein inference, PeptideShaker attempts to give you the best possible understanding of your proteomics data

By combining the results from multiple search engines, while re-calculating PTM localization scores and redoing the protein inference, PeptideShaker attempts to give you the best possible understanding of your proteomics data
